title: Ethereal Slovakian Chicken Salad
description: A floral crisp salad featuring sous vide chicken thighs dressed in a citrus herb vinaigrette, perfect for low carb meal prep.
instructions: Preheat a sous vide water bath to 65C and season chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
Vacuum‑seal the chicken thighs and cook them in the bath for 2 hours.
Remove the thighs, pat them dry, and sear them in a hot skillet with 1 tbsp olive oil until golden, about 1 minute per side.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice it thinly.
In a small bowl whisk together lemon juice, Dijon mustard, honey, and 1 tbsp olive oil to make the vinaigrette.
Stir in chopped dill, parsley, capers, and a pinch of sea salt.
Toss the arugula and sliced red onion in the vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Arrange the arugula mixture on a plate and top with sliced chicken thighs.
Garnish with extra dill and a scatter of capers.
Serve immediately or refrigerate portions for meal prep up to 3 days.
